spanish: Si estás pensando en comprar un nuevo móvil de alta gama, lo más probable es que hayas pensado en marcas como Apple.
english: If you're thinking about buying a new high-end phone, chances are you've thought about brands like Apple.
explanation: Uses present subjunctive 'hayas pensado' after the impersonal expression 'lo más probable es que' to express probability about a current situation.

spanish: Un combo que podría convertir a este móvil en uno de los mejores de 2026.
english: A combo that could turn this phone into one of the best of 2026.
explanation: Uses conditional 'podría' with the structure 'convertir... en' (to turn into) and the superlative 'uno de los mejores' (one of the best).
